race.comment: OPTIMUS PRIME (14) was sound fresh before coming back to maiden grade and beating the older horses at Kalgoorlie last time out. Pike hops back on board now and although the wide draw is a niggle, his profile suggests he has further improvement to come. Can repeat the dose. RADIANT LIGHT (1) led and won as an odds-on favourite before missing in a photo last start when favourite in a Class 1 at Belmont. The 3kg claim of Li comes in handy again and he'll give them something to chase from the front. MISS DEFIES ME (9) gets a completely different scenario here, getting back in his first two runs back from a break. She now draws inside for Chris Parnham third-up into the campaign and a much better effort is expected this time. COSMIC TREAT (3) was solid on resumption in a good race and the form out of that has already been franked. Can go one better. BUDERIM (2) can improve with the fresh run under his belt.
